clear_lower_levels.name: Clear the Lower Levels
clear_lower_levels.summary: Descend and eliminate corrupted entities blocking life support
clear_lower_levels.description: Engineer Voss dispatches you from Thestra Hub to investigate the lower levels. Corrupted entities have cut off the city's water, food, and power. Descend through the intake and clear the threats below.
objectives: Speak with Engineer Voss in Thestra Hub.
Eliminate Husk Brute in Corroded Conduit.
Defeat the Ash Sovereign in Hydro Core.

aid_survivors.name: Aid the Survivors
aid_survivors.summary: Clear a path so hub medics can reach trapped lower-level survivors
aid_survivors.description: Healer Mira asks for your help. Trapped survivors linger in the lower levels, but corrupted growths block the route. Clear the path so medics can reach them safely.
objectives: Speak with Healer Mira in Thestra Hub.
Navigate Root Cavity and defeat Thorn Parasite.
Report the path is clear to Healer Mira.

restore_purifier.name: Restore the Purifier
restore_purifier.summary: Defeat the Ash Sovereign and bring the Hydro Core online
restore_purifier.description: With the depths partially cleared, Voss orders the final push. Restore power at Pulse Reactor, then descend to Hydro Core and defeat the Ash Sovereign to free the water purifier.
objectives: Restore power in Pulse Reactor and defeat Static Wraith.
Confront and defeat Boss Ash Sovereign.
Return to Thestra Hub with systems online.
